checks.name: required_files_exist
checks.detail: all evaluation registry, metrics, comparison and report files exist

checks.name: registry_protocol_consistent
checks.detail: registry rows share the evaluation protocol

checks.name: metric_protocol_consistent
checks.detail: metric rows share the evaluation protocol

checks.name: metric_ranges_valid
checks.detail: metric values satisfy ratio and non-negative bounds

checks.name: demand_conservation
checks.detail: operational demand metrics conserve total demand

checks.name: cost_conservation
checks.detail: operational cost metrics conserve total cost

checks.name: missing_artifacts_explicit
checks.detail: missing artifacts are explicitly represented with notes
